title: I tested Sony's new entry-level turntable and, though it sounds decent enough, you deserve so much more than a brand logo for this money
summary: The Sony PS-LX3BT is one of the first new turntables to leave Sony’s R&D department in years. The stylus part here looks strikingly like one of Audio-Technica’s AT-3600 series, but is “designed specifically for this turntable”, according to Sony’s website FAQ.
caption: output/2026-07-20/i-tested-sony-s-new-entry-level-turntable-and-though-it-sounds-decent-.txt
